findings.title: All AI Crawlers Blocked by robots.txt
findings.description: The robots.txt catch-all rule (User-agent: * / Disallow: /) blocks every AI crawler not explicitly whitelisted. GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, Google-Extended, and 14+ others cannot access any page. ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, and Google AI Overviews are all blind to this site.

findings.title: Zero AI Crawler Whitelist Entries
findings.description: No AI crawler has an explicit Allow rule in robots.txt. All fall under the terminal catch-all block. The site is structurally invisible to every generative AI search engine.

findings.title: No llms.txt File
findings.description: The llms.txt standard (adopted by ChatGPT and Perplexity) provides AI-readable site summaries. No file exists at remaxedgeny.com/llms.txt — zero AI-readable content summary is provided.

findings.title: No Structured Data (Schema Markup)
findings.description: RealEstateAgent, LocalBusiness, Organization, WebSite, and Person schemas are all absent. AI models cannot perform entity recognition or build a knowledge graph node for RE/MAX Edge.

findings.title: Blog Abandoned Since August 2019
findings.description: All editorial content is 6-7 years stale in a high-frequency data market. Real estate market data, mortgage rates, and neighborhood pricing change quarterly. Stale content disqualifies the site as a citable source for AI systems.

findings.title: Cloudflare Challenge Blocks Crawlers (HTTP 403)
findings.description: The site returns a JavaScript challenge page to bot-like user agents. This affects not just AI crawlers but also standard SEO audit tools and monitoring services. Googlebot may be indexing a challenge page rather than real content.

findings.title: No Author Bios or Agent Credential Pages
findings.description: Agent subdomain pages (agent.remaxedgeny.com) return 403 errors. No agent bios, credentials, or transaction histories are accessible on the main domain — critical E-E-A-T gap.

findings.title: Bingbot Crawl-Delay: 120 Seconds
findings.description: The robots.txt sets a 120-second crawl delay for bingbot. At this rate, Bing cannot maintain a fresh index of a real estate site with hundreds of active listing pages. This directly throttles Bing Copilot's knowledge of the site.

findings.title: No sameAs Entity Links
findings.description: AI models use sameAs schema properties to perform cross-platform entity resolution. Without them, ChatGPT, Gemini, and Perplexity cannot connect remaxedgeny.com to the brand's Zillow, LinkedIn, Facebook, and remax.com profiles.

findings.title: IDX Listings Are JavaScript-Rendered
findings.description: Property search results load via AJAX/JavaScript. AI crawlers cannot execute JavaScript, making the core inventory of the site — its listings — invisible to all AI search engines.

findings.title: No FAQ Sections
findings.description: FAQ-formatted content is the highest-value AI citation format. No FAQ sections exist on the main site. This is the most common source of AI-generated answers about real estate services.

findings.title: All Performance Claims Are Unsourced
findings.description: '#1 Brooklyn MLS' and '4% higher sale price' are self-asserted with no citations to MLS data or external reports. AI models deprioritize unsourced claims in generated answers.

findings.title: LinkedIn Company Page Underdeveloped
findings.description: 440 followers for a 51-200 agent brokerage ranked #1 in Brooklyn MLS. LinkedIn is Bing Copilot's primary Microsoft ecosystem trust signal and a key Gemini entity signal. Current presence is severely underperforming.

findings.title: No YouTube Channel
findings.description: YouTube is the primary missing Google ecosystem asset. It feeds Gemini's multi-modal sourcing and provides high-authority backlinks. Neighborhood tour videos and market updates would directly improve Gemini scores.

findings.title: No Reddit Presence
findings.description: Reddit is Perplexity's #1 community validation signal. No mentions of remaxedgeny.com or 'RE/MAX Edge Brooklyn' were found in any subreddit. Authentic participation in r/Brooklyn and r/NYCRealEstate would directly improve Perplexity citability.

findings.title: No IndexNow Protocol
findings.description: IndexNow allows instant notification of new content to Bing (and Yandex) without waiting for crawl cycles. Not implemented — new listings and blog posts take longer to appear in Bing/Copilot results.

findings.title: No Wikipedia Entity for RE/MAX Edge Brooklyn
findings.description: While RE/MAX corporate has Wikipedia coverage, the Brooklyn-specific RE/MAX Edge brand has no Wikipedia article. This limits ChatGPT's entity recognition for this specific franchise location.

quick_wins.action: Fix robots.txt — add explicit Allow rules for GPTBot, OAI-SearchBot, ChatGPT-User, ClaudeBot, anthropic-ai, PerplexityBot, Google-Extended, Bytespider, DuckAssistBot. This unlocks all AI search visibility immediately.
Enable Cloudflare 'Known Bots' verified bot allowlisting in WAF settings — stops serving JS challenge pages to search and AI crawlers across all 5 platforms simultaneously.
Reduce bingbot crawl-delay from 120 seconds to 10 seconds in robots.txt — enables Bing Copilot to maintain a fresh index of listing pages.
Implement JSON-LD schema: RealEstateAgent + LocalBusiness + WebSite on every page, with sameAs links to remax.com, Zillow, LinkedIn, Facebook. Full template provided.
Create llms.txt at remaxedgeny.com/llms.txt describing the brokerage, agents, service areas, and key pages — direct AI readability standard adopted by ChatGPT and Perplexity.
Restart blog: minimum 2 posts/month. Priority topics: monthly Brooklyn MLS market data reports with sourced statistics, neighborhood pricing trends, NYC co-op/condo guides. Last post: 2019.

Add FAQPage schema to homepage targeting 5 high-intent queries: 'What is the best real estate brokerage in Brooklyn?', 'Who is the #1 RE/MAX agent in Brooklyn?', 'How much does it cost to sell a home in Brooklyn?'
Build LinkedIn company page: post weekly market updates, complete all profile fields, grow followers. LinkedIn is Bing Copilot's primary trust signal — 440 followers is severely underdeveloped.

business_info.name: RE/MAX Edge
business_info.award: 2024 Inman New York Power Broker Award

      "telephone": "+1-718-288-3835",
      "priceRange": "$$",
      "address": {
        "@type": "PostalAddress",

        "addressLocality": "Brooklyn",

        "postalCode": "11214",
        "addressCountry": "US"
      },
      "geo": {
        "@type": "GeoCoordinates",
        "latitude": 40.6011,
        "longitude": -74.0024
      },
      "areaServed": [
        {"@type": "City", "name": "Brooklyn"},
        {"@type": "City", "name": "Staten Island"},
        {"@type": "City", "name": "Manhattan"},
        {"@type": "City", "name": "Queens"},
        {"@type": "City", "name": "The Bronx"}
      ],
      "founder": {
        "@type": "Person",
        "name": "Michael Napolitano",
        "jobTitle": "Broker/Owner"
      },
      "memberOf": {"@type": "Organization", "name": "RE/MAX LLC", "url": "https://www.remax.com"},
      "sameAs": [
        "https://www.remax.com/real-estate-offices/remax-edge-brooklyn-ny/101946086",
        "https://www.facebook.com/remaxedgeny/",
        "https://www.linkedin.com/company/remax-edge-ny",
        "https://www.zillow.com/profile/REMAX%20EDGE"
      ]
    }
  ]
}
</script>
